hero.subtitle: Sign up, join El Reto and show that cooking is your passion.

whatIs.title: What is El Reto?
whatIs.description: El Reto 2026 is the online culinary competition where thousands of people compete from home. Earn points, upload your dishes, climb the ranking and show your culinary talent.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.phase0Desc: Record your introduction video from the mobile App.
howItWorks.phase1Desc: Show your culinary knowledge and earn points.
howItWorks.phase2Desc: Cook and upload your weekly videos.
howItWorks.phase3Desc: Top ranked contestants compete for the title.

recetarioSection.title: The Eternal Recipe Book
recetarioSection.description: Digitize your family's handwritten recipes with artificial intelligence. Save them forever.

faqSection.title: Frequently asked questions
faqSection.a1: It's the world's largest online culinary competition. You participate from home, upload videos and compete for real prizes.
faqSection.a3: Yes. Phase 0 (video casting) can only be completed from the mobile App, as it needs access to the camera and microphone.
faqSection.a4: Points accumulate by completing challenges, trivias, and weekly challenges. They determine your ranking position.
faqSection.q5: Can I participate from any country?
faqSection.a5: Currently The Challenge takes place in Spain, so only residents of Spanish territory can participate. It will expand to other countries in future editions.

bases.subtitle: Everything you need to know to participate in The Challenge 2026.
bases.a1: All persons over 18 years of age residing in Spain who have a passion for cooking can participate. You don't need to be a professional, just eager to learn and compete.
bases.q2: How does the points system work?
bases.a2: Points are the currency of The Challenge. They accumulate by completing daily mini challenges, interacting with the community, participating in weekly challenges, attending live streams, and receiving donations from other users. The more points you accumulate, the better your ranking position.
bases.a3: The Digital Mitt is your symbol of entry into the game. It activates after uploading your presentation video and represents your commitment to The Challenge. It's your active participant credential.
bases.a4: The ranking updates in real time based on accumulated points. Your position determines your access to exclusive experiences: Top 1,000 receives the Mystery Box, Top 100 accesses the in-person event, and the Top 5 lives the MasterChef Experience.
bases.a5: It's the first major milestone of The Challenge. Only the 1,000 participants with the most points will receive an exclusive Mystery Box with special MasterChef-related content.
bases.q6: What does the MasterChef Experience include?
bases.a6: The MasterChef Experience is the ultimate prize for the 5 finalists. It includes an immersive experience in the MasterChef world that will be revealed to the winners.
bases.a7: Accumulated points are preserved, but prolonged inactivity can affect your relative position if other participants keep earning. That's why we say: the ranking never sleeps.
bases.q8: Do I need the app to participate?
bases.a8: Yes, the entire Challenge ecosystem lives in the MasterChef World app. From there you can see your points, the ranking, receive notifications, participate in live streams and complete challenges.
